difficulty_note: Post-Misty Rocket cleanup fight. Keeps classic Cerulean TM theft structure while adding a Drowzee clue that Rocket is tracking Bill's network data.

player_side.story_support: Red blocks the ruined doorway so the Rocket thief cannot run while Antman battles.

opponent.intent: recover the stolen TM beat, show Rocket's black-market item route, and point the player toward Vermilion shipping pressure
